_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Monitor and optimize data application performance, including resource utilization analysis, query performance profiling, bottleneck identification, and capacity planning for growth.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. Task TF-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-012 (OP, cosine: 0.589), AI-T-014 (AI, cosine: 0.546).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.627). Shared vocabulary: [capacity, data]. NICE-only terms [determine, requirements] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, application, bottleneck, growth, identification, monitor] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.880, R=0.869). Balanced P/R — the 4-word NICE element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Determine data capacity requirements" and "Monitor and optimize data application performance, including resource utilizatio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.603 ≈ STS 0.627 (gap 0.024). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [capacity, data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [capacity, data]. NICE-only: [determine, requirements]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, application, bottleneck, growth, identification, monitor].
